How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
digest.tldr: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

digest.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
digest.tldr: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes.
